name: @garage44/expressio
description: Community edition of Expressio - Automated i18n tooling for software projects
author: Garage44

scripts.link: cd ../bunchy && bun link && cd ../enola && bun link && cd ../tsconfig && bun link && cd ../eslint-config && bun link && cd ../common && bun link && cd ../expressio && bun link @garage44/bunchy @garage44/enola @garage44/tsconfig @garage44/eslint-config @garage44/common
scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development BUN_ENV=development bun run --watch service.ts start
